name: Plain Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the top of a double boiler.
2. Cook, stirring constantly, over boiling water until thickened.
3. Allow to cool.
4. Beat to spreading consistency.
Yield: Frosting for 9 inches X 13 inches or 24 servings. Food Exchange per serving: 0.5 BREAD EXCHANGE + 0.2 FAT EXCHANGE CAL: 25
